calendar.matters:
Petition For The Reformation Of Designation Of Beneficiary Of Decedent'S Ira
Off Calendar Feb-27-2024 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Sheri Hoffman, Esq., for Paul Lok, Petitioner.

At the court's query, counsel offers advocacy for her petition. The court questions whether Lily's intent was to name the trust as the beneficiary of the IRA when Robert Lok was the named beneficiary. The court advises that it is not convinced that is has legal authority to believe differently.

The court stated that it intends to take the matter under submission with the intent to deny it. Counsel advises that there are no objections to the instant petition. The court stated that it will take counsel's testimony under consideration.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Prado. Not Reported.
